recommendations.title: And While We Were Here
recommendations.overview: Trapped in a loveless marriage, a troubled writer experiences a sexual awakening when she meets a carefee American in Italy.

recommendations.title: L!fe Happens
recommendations.overview: A comedy centered on two best friends, Kim and Deena, who fight to maintain normalcy in their lives after Kim gets pregnant and has a baby.

recommendations.title: Marry Me
recommendations.overview: After finding out about her fiancé's cheating ways, a pop superstar impulsively marries a total stranger. They must soon decide if two people from such different worlds can find true love.

recommendations.title: Entergalactic
recommendations.overview: Ambitious artist Jabari attempts to balance success and love when he moves into his dream Manhattan apartment and falls for his next-door neighbor.

recommendations.title: Make Me Believe
recommendations.overview: Two meddling grannies trick their adult grandkids into a meet-cute that reignites a childhood crush and old grudges.

recommendations.title: Brothers
recommendations.overview: When his helicopter goes down during his fourth tour of duty in Afghanistan, Marine Sam Cahill is presumed dead. Back home, brother Tommy steps in to look over Sam’s wife, Grace, and two children. Sam’s surprise homecoming triggers domestic mayhem.

recommendations.title: Save the Date
recommendations.overview: After breaking up with her boyfriend, a bookstore manager resists a seemingly perfect guy's attempts to woo her.

recommendations.title: Irma la Douce
recommendations.overview: When a recently fired policeman falls in love with a French prostitute, he doesn't want her to be with other men, so he creates an alter-ego in order to become her only customer.

recommendations.title: Love Hard
recommendations.overview: An LA girl, unlucky in love, falls for an East Coast guy on a dating app and decides to surprise him for Christmas, only to discover that she's been catfished. But the object of her affection actually lives in the same town, and the guy who duped her

recommendations.title: Coffee Town
